data.title: Trinity Investments moves HQ to Miami, Florida, showcasing commitment to the state as a strategic business hub.
data.description: Trinity Investments, a global investment firm specializing in hospitality, has revealed that its headquarters will now be based in Miami, Florida. This move showcases the firm's dedication to growth, with Miami serving as a central location for its operations. The decision to relocate signifies a strategic shift, positioning Trinity close to major hospitality markets and enhancing connections with global capital sources and institutional collaborators. This change in headquarters demonstrates Trinity's focus on expanding its presence in Florida for long-term success.

data.title: Lincoln Property Company promotes Emily Johnson Moghadam to Head of Lease Admin & Compliance, appoints David Arwady as Head of Project Management in CAS team.
data.description: Dallas-based Lincoln Property Company has recently announced key changes within their leadership team. Emily Johnson Moghadam has been promoted to Head of Lease Administration & Compliance, while David Arwady has been appointed as Head of Project Management. These new roles are part of Lincoln's Corporate Advisory & Solutions (CAS) platform, which offers comprehensive real estate services aimed at assisting occupiers in efficiently aligning their space, cost, and operations with their business objectives. Lincoln Property Company is a global real estate firm known for its full-service approach.

data.title: Affirm partners with Lowe’s to offer flexible payment options for home improvement projects. Customers get clear payment plans on Lowe’s app.
data.description: In a recent collaboration, Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM) and Lowe’s (NYSE: LOW) have joined forces to enhance the payment options available to Lowe’s customers carrying out home improvement projects. This new partnership will provide Lowe’s shoppers with increased visibility and management over their payment methods. Affirm is set to introduce its clear payment plans for online transactions and within the Lowe’s mobile app. Lowe’s will receive prominent placement on the Affirm marketplace, broadening its exposure to Affirm’s community of active buyers. Through the selection of Affirm at the point of purchase, Lowe’s customers will benefit from a more streamlined payment process.

data.title: Nextpower signs multi-year steel frame deal with Jinko Solar (U.S.) for >1 gigawatt, boosting solar plant solutions.
data.description: In FREMONT, California, Nextpower™ (NASDAQ: NXT), a prominent company specializing in intelligent power generation technology for solar power plants, has disclosed a significant development. They have secured their second major commercial order for U.S.-manufactured steel module frames and have signed a multi-year supply deal with Jinko Solar (U.S.) Industries Inc. (NYSE: JKS). Jinko Solar is known as one of the oldest solar module manufacturers in the U.S. Through this agreement, Nextpower is set to provide over one gigawatt of steel module frames.

TRADERS BET DHS SHUTDOWN WILL LAST JUST 22 DAYS Kalshi traders now price a partial DHS shutdown at about 22 days, down from a 30-day peak last week. Congress returns Feb 23, leaving uncertainty over a quick resolution or prolonged shutdown.

data.title: Office Anesthesia partners with celebrities & leaders to help pediatric dental patients; nationwide initiative launched.
data.description: In Beverly Hills, California on February 17, 2026, Office Anesthesia disclosed a plan in conjunction with celebrities, healthcare figures, and donors to enhance healthcare access for underprivileged individuals, particularly pediatric dental patients. This nationwide effort aims to assist those in need, with a focus on improving access to care for those who require it the most.

data.title: 95% of marketers now use AI, revealing universal adoption in marketing as per Typeform research.
data.description: As artificial intelligence (AI) integration continues to grow extensively in marketing, consumers are placing greater emphasis on the quality of interactions rather than just transparency. A recent report titled "Get Real: Generative AI and the Marketer," released by Typeform in San Francisco on February 17, 2026, highlights this shift. The report delves into the influence of AI on marketing strategies.
Iran foreign minister: Iran neither seeks to manufacture or accrue nuclear weapons

data.title: True Fit launches AI shopping agent with 20 years of fit data, powered by 100s of millions of profiles, helping increase conversions and reduce returns.
data.description: In Boston, a prominent fit and fashion intelligence provider called True Fit has unveiled a new shopping agent for the fashion retail sector. This innovative agent utilizes a vast database consisting of hundreds of millions of shopper profiles and almost two decades' worth of purchase and returns information. The technology is designed to recognize 'Will this fit?' scenarios instantly, assisting shoppers in finding sizes and styles that align with their preferences. Retailers and brands that implement True Fit witness improved conversion rates, reduced fit-related returns, and increased customer satisfaction.

data.title: Ripple CEO predicts 80% chance of Clarity Act passing by April, urges acceptance of imperfect bill to avoid regulatory uncertainties.
data.description: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse is optimistic about the Clarity Act's chances of passing, giving it an 80% probability of approval by the end of April. He emphasized the importance of the industry embracing an imperfect bill in order to address ongoing regulatory uncertainties. Garlinghouse revealed that the Clarity Act had almost made it through the Senate Banking Committee markup process before encountering obstacles. He urged stakeholders to prioritize clarity over chaos, stating that while the current version of the Clarity Act may not be flawless, progress should not be hindered by the pursuit of perfection. Garlinghouse's advocacy for the bill stems from Ripple's own legal struggles with the SEC, which concluded with a court ruling that XRP is not a security.

data.title: Hagerman Group chooses Unanet for growth strategy, Feb. 17, 2026. Unanet is AI-first ERP product for project-based businesses.
data.description: A prominent construction company in Indiana has opted for a user-friendly solution to enhance its growth and operational efficiency. On February 17, 2026, in Dulles, Virginia, Unanet, a top provider of AI-driven ERP and growth tools for project-centric enterprises, revealed that The Hagerman Group (Hagerman) has chosen their platform. This decision aims to drive progress and streamline processes for The Hagerman Group, emphasizing the company's commitment to leveraging innovative technology for success.

data.title: Hexaware and Replit partner for RapidX® open version, integrating AI platform for enterprise applications.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Hexaware Technologies revealed the introduction of an open version of RapidX®, which now includes seamless integration with Replit, an AI platform. Hexaware Technologies, a prominent IT services and solutions provider based in Mumbai, India, London, and Iselin, N.J., made the announcement. The company's stock is listed on the National Stock Exchange of India under the symbol HEXT. This move aims to enhance accessibility and utilization of RapidX® among a wider audience of users seeking advanced IT solutions.

data.title: Moroccanoil launches new fragrance Lumière du Jour Eau de Parfum, inspired by first light of day - follows award-winning L'Originale EDP debut.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Moroccanoil launched its new fragrance, Lumière du Jour Eau de Parfum, following the success of its first perfume, L'Originale Eau de Parfum. The new fragrance is inspired by the early morning light and aims to evoke an alluring and romantic essence.

data.title: Jamie Weeks & Founders Row invest in Ohm Health, launching "Intentional Disconnection" wellness thesis. PRNewswire, Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: In Atlanta on February 17, 2026, Founders Row and its creator, Jamie Weeks, revealed a new strategic alliance with Ohm Health, signifying a crucial move in the company's belief that the wellness sector is transitioning to a new era focused on deliberate growth. This partnership highlights the beginning stage of their vision.

data.title: TrueDialog launches visual RCS composer for enterprise marketers, enabling creation and deployment of rich messaging.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on February 17, 2026, TrueDialog, a prominent company offering advanced SMS texting solutions for businesses, unveiled its new visual Rich Communication Services (RCS) composer. This tool empowers companies to craft, evaluate, and roll out interactive messages.

data.title: SOS debuts SosBot 1.0 for enterprise automation market, aims to tap into trillion-dollar market.
data.description: SOS Limited (NYSE: SOS) has introduced SosBot 1, an enterprise-grade actionable AI agent platform, in an effort to tap into the trillion-dollar enterprise automation market. The launch took place in New York on Feb. 17, 2026. SOS aims to provide companies with advanced AI execution layer infrastructure to enhance operational efficiency and productivity. This initiative is expected to revolutionize the automation industry and help businesses across various sectors streamline their processes. SOS is strategically positioning itself to capture a significant market share and capitalize on the increasing demand for AI-powered solutions.

data.title: Obol partners with DualEntry to enhance financial control, accounting, and cash flow ops with AI. NYC, Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement on Feb. 17, 2026, in New York, Obol, known for its AI-powered cash flow management platform, revealed a significant collaboration with DualEntry. This partnership aims to provide comprehensive financial oversight for accounting, banking, and cash flow functions. The integration of both platforms will offer modern businesses the opportunity to streamline their financial operations effectively.

data.title: Gentex Corporation introduces new Ops-Core Voice Projection Unit, enhancing communication for defense and emergency personnel.
data.description: Carbondale, Pennsylvania - On February 17, 2026, Gentex Corporation, a renowned provider of personal protection and situational awareness solutions for defense forces, emergency responders, and industrial personnel, introduced the Ops-Core Voice Projection Unit (VPU). This cutting-edge product aims to enhance communication abilities in challenging environments.

data.title: Universal Parking will manage Center Square in downtown Jacksonville to expand their presence.
data.description: A prominent parking management company, Universal Parking, is expanding its presence in downtown Jacksonville. On February 17, 2026, Universal Parking secured a new parking management contract for Center Square, a landmark location in the city. This development highlights the company's position as a key player in the parking industry, with continuous growth and innovation.

data.title: Kyrgyz broker Royal Pure Gold joins ITS as 20th partner, expands globally. Deal gives Kyrgyz investors access to international trading.
data.description: Royal Pure Gold, a brokerage firm based in Kyrgyzstan, has recently entered into a trading access agreement with the global trading platform ITS. This new agreement will provide Kyrgyz investors with access to international markets. This collaboration is expected to open up opportunities for investors in Kyrgyzstan to trade on a broader scale and access a wider range of investment options. The agreement marks a significant step in enhancing the investment landscape in Kyrgyzstan and facilitating international investment activities for the local market.
